title: Miztoc

'''Miztoc''' was an astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Miztoc system/Legends|Miztoc system]], a part of the [[Irnaj sector/Legends|Irnaj sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[D'Aelgoth Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]],<ref name="TEA" /> which linked it to the [[Keltos system/Legends|Keltos system]]<ref name="EGTW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' places the [[Keltos system/Legends|Keltos system]] on the segment of the [[D'Aelgoth Trade Route]] between the [[Feenix system/Legends|Feenix]] and [[Kriselist system/Legends|Kriselist systems]], and ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Miztoc system/Legends|Miztoc system]], and therefore Miztoc itself, on that same portion of the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]].</ref> as well as the [[Feenix system/Legends|Feenix system]] of the [[D'Aelgoth sector/Legends|D'Aelgoth sector]] and the [[Wornal sector/Legends|Wornal sector's]] [[Kriselist system/Legends|Kriselist system]].<ref name="Mid Rim">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-sectors-of-the-mid-rim|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Sectors of the Mid Rim}}</ref>

Miztoc was the site of [[Miztoc City]] and, during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], was under the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[battle of Miztoc City]] took place there.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] was victorious in<ref name="TEA" /> that decisive engagement, which was won due to the [[Human/Legends|Human]] operative [[Mygo Skinto]] first offering her services to the Alliance and which saw Miztoc become independent from the Empire. Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] later noted Skinto's role in Miztoc's history in an entry dedicated to her that was part of a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Miztoc was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Miztoc [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body, in grid square K-17.<ref name="TEA" />
